name: Was it real? | Cameron K.
description:
Unrequited love... Being in love with your best friend, you might expect the whole friends to lovers trope, right?

Wrong.

After 10 years of holding your feelings for him hostage you finally are planning (mainly working up the courage) on confessing.

After slowly losing his friendship to a new person. But you just got the news that he found a new partner.

The worst part is that his partner is the sweetest person on the planet.

_____________..._____________

"I find pieces of our life in my mind

Colors of the sky in your eyes

Fragments of the truth in your lies"

-Was it real? Ben Rodrigues

_____________..._____________

Art not mine

From Pinterest: https://pin.it/5ZVzuZY7x

Song lyrics from: Ben Rodrigues (Story mainly inspired from)
